arts.ttl: Son Heung-min shares which 'unbelievable' Spurs video of himself he's watched 'probably more than 100 times'
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur forward Son Heung-min has done more than enough to warrant a statue at N17. Spurs got themselves arguably the bargain of the century...

arts.ttl: Tamworth and Tom Tonks out to punish Tottenham with throw-in 'weapon' in FA Cup giant-killing
arts.sum: Tom Tonks can throw a football further than some can kick one

arts.ttl: How fifth-tier Tamworth plan to cause an FA Cup giant-killing against Tottenham - and the surprise that awaits for Son and Co, writes MATT BARLOW
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: The two teams' meeting is in essence what the FA Cup is about, threading English football together from top to bottom from the preliminary qualifiers to the final at Wembley Stadium.

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Tottenham in the race to sign Randal Kolo Muani with striker’s future undecided
arts.sum: According to Fabrice Hawkins, Paris Saint-Germain forward Randal Kolo Muani (26) is attracting the interest of several clubs around the continent ahead of a potential move in the winter transfer window.…

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou confirms latest on Timo Werner's Tottenham future
arts.sum: German forward has been linked with January return to Bundesliga

arts.ttl: Tamworth vs Tottenham is a David and Goliath clash that embodies the spirit of the FA Cup, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: We've had the minnows of Morecambe, Accrington and Salford taking on the giants of Chelsea, Liverpool and Manchester City, and today Tottenham travel to Tamworth.

arts.ttl: Spurs sign Czech goalkeeper Kinsky for £12.5m
arts.sum: Tottenham sign 21-year-old Czech goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky from Slavia Prague in a deal worth about £12.5m.

arts.ttl: Former Newcastle co-owner Amanda Staveley issues message amid Tottenham takeover links
arts.sum: Amid strong links with a Premier League rival in Spurs, Staveley issued a message to Newcastle supporters following their 2-0 triumph over Arsenal in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final tie earlier this week. Amanda Staveley has issued a message to Newcastle United supporters amid recent takeover links with Tottenham Hotspur .

arts.ttl: 'I am not convinced': Chris Sutton predicts result of Tottenham's FA Cup trip to Tamworth tomorrow
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are in FA Cup third-round action away at Tamworth on Sunday as they have a potentially very tricky encounter on their hands. Spurs...

arts.ttl: Tottenham have ‘concrete interest’ in ‘really good’ midfielder who wants to leave – journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are going to be active in the January transfer window. Tottenham want three signings through the door this month, and they already have...
